description: VR rehabilitation for left homonymous hemianopia with EEG neurofeedback

wiki.notes: Karpathy ingest pattern — compiled from sessions, research docs, scripts. Load index.md first, pull pages on-demand. 2026-05-14 research audit added 20+ verified citations + 3 citation corrections. 2026-05-16 Phase 1 scaffold session updated unity-architecture, rehabilitation-roadmap, audiovisual-training-protocol, hardware-setup. 2026-05-26 research-ops sprint added source queue, YouTube/X validation ladder, sprint reports, QEEG/tPBM watchlist, medication doctor brief, Obsidian HTML wrap-up, and Dr. Jacquemin NegletFix doctor brief with mobile HTML/PDF copies.

contrast-sensitivity-test.notes: Hemifield positioning fixed. First baseline recorded 2025-12-15. LCD-vs-printed Zeri 2018 caveat added to wiki 2026-05-14: results valid for within-instrument tracking only.

eeg-integration.notes: Muse headband integration via Mind Monitor OSC - decoupled from v1 critical path. RewardController.RewardMode.OpenLoop is default; EegGated reserved for v2 after Muse signal-quality validation per Treves 2025 JMIR meta-analysis.

audiovisual-training.notes: Phase 1 scaffold complete 2026-05-16 (commits ecf327f + 7ea389c + 24a3075 on main). Paradigm B (congruent-pair), Alharshan 2026 dose (30 min × 5×/week × 6 weeks = 15hr). Headless PlayMode smoke test passed 2026-05-30: shortened session completed and trial CSV opened/closed after fixing trialLogger dependency initialization. Quest/InputSystem response binding added 2026-05-30; strengthened smoke test simulates Space via Unity.InputSystem.TestFramework and verifies at least one hit/reward plus hit CSV columns. Manual smoke scene `Assets/Scenes/AVTrainingManualSmoke.unity` generated and placed first in Build Settings. Quest manual smoke passed 2026-05-30 on Quest 2 after adding UnityEngine.XR fallback polling: log showed `Oculus Touch Controller OpenXR/triggerButton`, reward events fired, pulled CSV `SmokeResults/av_training_2026-05-30_14-23-19.csv` with 44 rows / 42 hits. Follow-up guard added so in-flight trials cannot create extra logs after training ends; Android smoke APK rebuilt successfully at `Unity/NeglectFix/Builds/AVTrainingManualSmoke.apk`. Generated fallback visual stimulus upgraded from sphere to flat contrast-controlled disk/Gabor quad on 2026-05-30.

quest-dev-mode.notes: Quest 2 paired to Eric's Meta account 2026-05-16. April 27 blocker resolved: factory reset + re-pair (not org-membership invite as previously theorized). adb authorized, serial 1WMHH831TR1047, Android 14.

xr-plugin-management.notes: OpenXR + Meta Quest Support + Oculus Touch profile configured 2026-05-16. SSAO renderer feature disabled 2026-05-30 as Quest performance/polish cleanup.

baseline_results.notes: First validated measurement after fixing hemifield bug. LogCS values valid for within-instrument tracking only (Zeri 2018 LCD caveat). Expected outcome ranges revised per Yang/Cavanaugh/Saionz 2023: ~50-60% response rate at trained locations, blind-field CS stays ~4x lower than intact even with training.

next_actions: Optional: install/run the freshly rebuilt `Builds/AVTrainingManualSmoke.apk` once more to verify the post-training guard; controller response/reward smoke itself has passed
Quest 3 acquisition when budget allows (used via Back Market ~€350-450)
Phase 2 launch: 30-session Paradigm B program with mid-program CS checks
